name: CNMI Board of Professional Licensing Construction-Adjacent Licenses

agency.name: Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands Board of Professional Licensing

termsReviewNotes: No dedicated access, reuse, or website terms page was found in the official CNMI Board of Professional Licensing page or its public navigation during the 2026-06-27 review. Keep redistribution and automation status unknown.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against CNMI Board of Professional Licensing records before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: This source is construction-adjacent professional licensing metadata, not a confirmed contractor-specific registry.
CNMI business licenses, construction permits, contractor-specific requirements, and local enforcement records may require separate official sources.
The public lookup/export path and field structure have not been confirmed.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate any account, payment, or portal-only workflow without explicit opt-in and legal review.
publicRecordsNotes: Official CNMI BPL metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a contractor license, business license, permit, or professional authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for CNMI construction-adjacent professional licensing. Future work should research whether a contractor-specific board, business-license source, or public lookup exists.
maintainerNotes: Keep contractor-specific claims out of this entry until an official CNMI contractor source is verified.
